member.name: P:alphaWriter.Models.Book.DailyWordSnapshots
member.summary: Keyed by "yyyy-MM-dd". Value is the book's total word count at the end of that day's session. Used to compute the daily words-written delta in Writing Statistics.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Models.Scene.ExtractWords(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all words from the scene's HTML content as lowercase strings, with HTML, comments, and entities stripped. Used for statistics.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.ViewModels.SceneEntityOption
member.summary:
Represents a single character, location, or item in the scene-entity checklist inside the metadata panel.
IsSelected — the entity is linked to this scene (stored in Scene.CharacterIds / LocationIds / ItemIds).
IsAutoDetected — the entity's name or an alias currently appears in the scene's text. This is a display-only, recalculated flag; it is NOT persisted to the model.

member.name: P:alphaWriter.ViewModels.SceneEntityOption.Aka
member.summary: Raw comma-separated aka string, kept for fast re-detection.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.UpdateWordCountDisplay(alphaWriter.Models.Scene)
member.summary: Updates the toolbar word count display if the given scene is still selected.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.DebouncedSave
member.summary: Debounced save — resets the timer on every call.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.RebuildSceneEntityOptions
member.summary: Full rebuild: called on scene switch. Runs auto-detection first so that newly loaded content is already reflected in the option states.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.RefreshSceneEntityOptionStates
member.summary: Lightweight refresh: called whenever the editor content changes. Re-runs auto-detection and updates IsSelected / IsAutoDetected on existing options without rebuilding the entire list.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.AutoDetectSceneEntities
member.summary: Scans the current scene's HTML content and adds any entity whose name or alias is found as a whole word. Only ever ADDS — manual links are never removed by content changes.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.IsEntityDetectedInContent(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when or any alias in appears as a whole word in the scene HTML (case-insensitive, HTML tags stripped before matching).

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.BuildEntityRelationshipJson
member.summary: Builds a JSON string describing entity co-occurrence relationships across all scenes in the selected book. The JSON shape is: { nodes: [{ id, label, type, scenes }], edges: [{ from, to, value }] } where value is the number of scenes in which both entities appear together.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedBookChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Book)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedChapterChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Chapter)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedSceneChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Scene)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnIsBookInfoVisibleChanged(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSidebarModeChanged(alphaWriter.ViewModels.SidebarMode)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnSelectedCharacterChanged(alphaWriter.Models.Character)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.

member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.ViewModels.WriterViewModel.OnActiveStatsTabChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.PushEntitiesAsync
member.summary: Re-pushes the current entity manifest while a scene is live in the editor. Called when entity names/aliases change (EntitiesChanged event).

member.name: M:alphaWriter.Views.WriterPage.OnReportNavigating(System.Object,Microsoft.Maui.Controls.WebNavigatingEventArgs)
member.summary: Intercepts alphawriter://reportReady from the JS in entity-report.html — the definitive signal that vis.js loaded, the network was initialised, and setData() is callable.

member.name: T:alphaWriter.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .
